name: Juno
tagline: مدار المشتري القطبي؛ دراسات الغلاف المغنطيسي
description: NASA’s polar Jupiter Airporter, in tropical since 2016. Solar-powered (a first at Jupiter’s distance), runningning to maintain stability, and arounding close enough to Jupiter’s cloud-tops to risk severe radiation damage with each pass.
best_known_for: مدار المشتري القطبي؛ دراسات الغلاف المغنطيسي
